title: Leah's Cehntro Pack
description: MTR resource pack that adds the Cehntro family of trains
body:
# REQUIRED RESOURCES
Please install the resource library in order to use this pack.

[Leah's Resource Library | Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/leahs-resource-library)

[Leah's Cehntro Pack+ | Itch.io](https://queen-leah-k.itch.io/leahs-cehntro-pack-plus)

<details>
<summary>Trains</summary>
<details>
<summary>Class 156</summary>
  
- Acceleration: 0.5m/s²
- Decceleration: 0.8m/s²
- Max Speed: 75mph
- Era: 1995
- Cars per unit: 3
- Power: Diesel
- Mode: Regional
- Motors/Prime Movers: Perkins 2006 TW-H

</details>
<details>
<summary>Class 161</summary>
  
- Acceleration: 0.7m/s²
- Decceleration: 1.0m/s²
- Max Speed: 100mph
- Era: 1993/2016
- Cars per unit: 2
- Power: Diesel
- Mode: Regional
- Motors/Prime Movers: Diesel Deutz v8

</details>
<details>
<summary>Class 330</summary>
  
- Acceleration: 0.7m/s²
- Decceleration: 0.8m/s²
- Max Speed: 75mph
- Era: 1993
- Cars per unit: 4
- Power: Alternating Current Electric
- Mode: Regional
- Motors/Prime Movers: Singing GTO-VVVF

</details>
<details>
<summary>Class 330 (Refurbished)</summary>
  
- Acceleration: 0.9m/s²
- Decceleration: 1.0m/s²
- Max Speed: 100mph
- Era: 1993/2016
- Cars per unit: 4
- Power: Alternating Current Electric
- Mode: Regiona
- Motors/Prime Movers: Hitachi IGBT-VVVF

</details>
<details>
<summary>Class 331</summary>
  
- Acceleration: 0.7m/s²
- Decceleration: 0.8m/s²
- Max Speed: 75mph
- Era: 1993
- Cars per unit: 4
- Power: Alternating Current Electric
- Mode: Regional
- Motors/Prime Movers: Metro Cammel GTO-VVVF

</details>
<details>
<summary>Class 430</summary>
  
- Acceleration: 0.7m/s²
- Decceleration: 0.8m/s²
- Max Speed: 75mph
- Era: 1993
- Cars per unit: 4
- Power: Direct Current Electric
- Mode: Regional
- Motors/Prime Movers: Singing GTO-VVVF

</details>
<details>
<summary>Class 431</summary>
  
- Acceleration: 0.7m/s²
- Decceleration: 0.8m/s²
- Max Speed: 75mph
- Era: 1993
